Name: insertAuthOauth2Clients
SQL: WITH check_mutation_result_0 AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $1::text AS "client_id") AS data WHERE true), mutation_result_0 AS (INSERT INTO "auth"."oauth2_clients" ("client_id") SELECT check_mutation_result_0."client_id" FROM check_mutation_result_0 RETURNING *), check_mutation_result_1 AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $2::text AS "client_id") AS data WHERE true), mutation_result_1 AS (INSERT INTO "auth"."oauth2_clients" ("client_id") SELECT check_mutation_result_1."client_id" FROM check_mutation_result_1 RETURNING *), mutation_result AS (SELECT mutation_result_0."client_id", mutation_result_0."client_secret_hash", mutation_result_0."redirect_uris", mutation_result_0."scopes", mutation_result_0."type", mutation_result_0."metadata", mutation_result_0."metadata_document_fetched_at", mutation_result_0."created_by", mutation_result_0."created_at", mutation_result_0."updated_at" FROM mutation_result_0 UNION ALL SELECT mutation_result_1."client_id", mutation_result_1."client_secret_hash", mutation_result_1."redirect_uris", mutation_result_1."scopes", mutation_result_1."type", mutation_result_1."metadata", mutation_result_1."metadata_document_fetched_at", mutation_result_1."created_by", mutation_result_1."created_at", mutation_result_1."updated_at" FROM mutation_result_1), check_nested_authRequests_row_0 AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $3::text AS "redirect_uri", $4::text AS "response_type", $5::timestamptz AS "expires_at", mutation_result_0."client_id" AS "client_id" FROM mutation_result_0) AS data WHERE true), nested_authRequests_row_0 AS (INSERT INTO "auth"."oauth2_auth_requests" ("redirect_uri", "response_type", "expires_at", "client_id") SELECT check_nested_authRequests_row_0."redirect_uri", check_nested_authRequests_row_0."response_type", check_nested_authRequests_row_0."expires_at", mutation_result_0."client_id" FROM check_nested_authRequests_row_0, mutation_result_0 RETURNING *), check_nested_authRequests_row_1 AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $6::text AS "redirect_uri", $7::text AS "response_type", $8::timestamptz AS "expires_at", mutation_result_0."client_id" AS "client_id" FROM mutation_result_0) AS data WHERE true), nested_authRequests_row_1 AS (INSERT INTO "auth"."oauth2_auth_requests" ("redirect_uri", "response_type", "expires_at", "client_id") SELECT check_nested_authRequests_row_1."redirect_uri", check_nested_authRequests_row_1."response_type", check_nested_authRequests_row_1."expires_at", mutation_result_0."client_id" FROM check_nested_authRequests_row_1, mutation_result_0 RETURNING *), check_nested_authRequests_row_2 AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $9::text AS "redirect_uri", $10::text AS "response_type", $11::timestamptz AS "expires_at", mutation_result_1."client_id" AS "client_id" FROM mutation_result_1) AS data WHERE true), nested_authRequests_row_2 AS (INSERT INTO "auth"."oauth2_auth_requests" ("redirect_uri", "response_type", "expires_at", "client_id") SELECT check_nested_authRequests_row_2."redirect_uri", check_nested_authRequests_row_2."response_type", check_nested_authRequests_row_2."expires_at", mutation_result_1."client_id" FROM check_nested_authRequests_row_2, mutation_result_1 RETURNING *), nested_authRequests AS (SELECT nested_authRequests_row_0."id", nested_authRequests_row_0."client_id", nested_authRequests_row_0."scopes", nested_authRequests_row_0."redirect_uri", nested_authRequests_row_0."state", nested_authRequests_row_0."nonce", nested_authRequests_row_0."response_type", nested_authRequests_row_0."code_challenge", nested_authRequests_row_0."code_challenge_method", nested_authRequests_row_0."resource", nested_authRequests_row_0."user_id", nested_authRequests_row_0."done", nested_authRequests_row_0."auth_time", nested_authRequests_row_0."created_at", nested_authRequests_row_0."expires_at" FROM nested_authRequests_row_0 UNION ALL SELECT nested_authRequests_row_1."id", nested_authRequests_row_1."client_id", nested_authRequests_row_1."scopes", nested_authRequests_row_1."redirect_uri", nested_authRequests_row_1."state", nested_authRequests_row_1."nonce", nested_authRequests_row_1."response_type", nested_authRequests_row_1."code_challenge", nested_authRequests_row_1."code_challenge_method", nested_authRequests_row_1."resource", nested_authRequests_row_1."user_id", nested_authRequests_row_1."done", nested_authRequests_row_1."auth_time", nested_authRequests_row_1."created_at", nested_authRequests_row_1."expires_at" FROM nested_authRequests_row_1 UNION ALL SELECT nested_authRequests_row_2."id", nested_authRequests_row_2."client_id", nested_authRequests_row_2."scopes", nested_authRequests_row_2."redirect_uri", nested_authRequests_row_2."state", nested_authRequests_row_2."nonce", nested_authRequests_row_2."response_type", nested_authRequests_row_2."code_challenge", nested_authRequests_row_2."code_challenge_method", nested_authRequests_row_2."resource", nested_authRequests_row_2."user_id", nested_authRequests_row_2."done", nested_authRequests_row_2."auth_time", nested_authRequests_row_2."created_at", nested_authRequests_row_2."expires_at" FROM nested_authRequests_row_2), check_nested_authRequests_nested_authorizationCodes AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $12::text AS "code_hash", $13::timestamptz AS "expires_at", nested_authRequests_row_0."id" AS "auth_request_id" FROM nested_authRequests_row_0 UNION ALL SELECT $14::text AS "code_hash", $15::timestamptz AS "expires_at", nested_authRequests_row_0."id" AS "auth_request_id" FROM nested_authRequests_row_0 UNION ALL SELECT $16::text AS "code_hash", $17::timestamptz AS "expires_at", nested_authRequests_row_1."id" AS "auth_request_id" FROM nested_authRequests_row_1 UNION ALL SELECT $18::text AS "code_hash", $19::timestamptz AS "expires_at", nested_authRequests_row_2."id" AS "auth_request_id" FROM nested_authRequests_row_2) AS data WHERE true), nested_authRequests_nested_authorizationCodes AS (INSERT INTO "auth"."oauth2_authorization_codes" ("code_hash", "expires_at", "auth_request_id") SELECT check_nested_authRequests_nested_authorizationCodes."code_hash", check_nested_authRequests_nested_authorizationCodes."expires_at", check_nested_authRequests_nested_authorizationCodes."auth_request_id" FROM check_nested_authRequests_nested_authorizationCodes RETURNING *) SELECT json_build_object('affected_rows', ((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mutation_result) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_authRequests) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_authRequests_nested_authorizationCodes)), 'returning', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json("_e")), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT mutation_result."client_id" AS "clientId" FROM mutation_result WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_authRequests) IS NOT NULL AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_authRequests_nested_authorizationCodes) IS NOT NULL) AS "_e"))
